name: @fps4/identity-service-react
description: Optional React UI for identity-service — drop-in <Login/> and <Register/> for consumer apps (RQ-0003 / RQ-0015), with opt-in Auth0-style card chrome (RQ-0016). Separate from the headless @fps4/identity-service-sdk SDK so server-side consumers never pull in React.

scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run clean && npm run build
